data.title: Seizing oil tankers by Trump costs U.S. tens of millions; maintaining one ship cost $47 million.
data.description: President Trump previously expressed optimism about profiting from seizing tankers, however, it has been revealed that the expense of upkeep for a single deteriorating ship has already exceeded $47 million.

China-US trade talks to begin on Sunday It’s almost six months since the last round of economic and trade talks between China and the US. Now delegations from both countries are set to meet in Paris. Chinese Vice Premier He Lifeng will lead the Chinese delegation to France.

data.title: Tevogen Reaffirms Capital Discipline as Lead Investor Maintains Holdings and Company Limits Share Utilization
data.description: Tevogen is focusing on maintaining strict control over capital, limiting the use of shares, and showcasing significant insider ownership. The company is also considering potential acquisitions as part of their strategy to accurately represent the value of their assets.

data.title: Impact of Middle East Conflict on TotalEnergies Activities
data.description: In Paris, TotalEnergies has confirmed reports from March 10, 2026, indicating the shutdown or impending closure of production facilities in Qatar, Iraq, and UAE offshore operations, which collectively account for about 15% of the company's total output. Onshore production in UAE, with TotalEnergies sharing around 210 thousand barrels per day, remains unaffected. The company notes that operational cash flow from the Middle East operations is below the overall portfolio average, primarily due to elevated taxation levels.

data.title: Why MARA Holdings Shares Are Surging Friday
data.description: Shares of MARA Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: MARA) experienced an increase in trading on Friday, in correlation with the rising prices of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC). Bitcoin reached $71,194.33, marking a 1.14% increase over the past 24 hours according to CoinMarketCap. This surge reflects a general improvement in the sentiment surrounding digital assets. Bitcoin has maintained a 4.92% increase over the last week, prompting positive market reactions. The overall momentum in the cryptocurrency market remains robust, with Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) also seeing gains after significant Bitcoin acquisitions. Executive Chairman Michael Saylor recently mentioned on X about the time lapse between acquiring Bitcoin and its subsequent movement.

data.title: Hale Capital Partners Acquires APEX Analytics (formerly Voxtur Analytics), Expanding Strategic Investment in Real Estate Technology and Analytics
data.description: In New York on March 13, 2026, Hale Capital Management, a private equity firm based in the city, has successfully finalized the acquisition of a prominent real estate data analytics and valuation technology provider. Hale Capital specializes in investing in technology and technology-enabled businesses. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for the firm as it expands its portfolio. The financial details of the transaction, including the exact numbers involved, have not been disclosed to the public.
